title: Word Motion Cleanup
brief: Fix a sentence with typos using word-based movement and edits.
objectives: Expected words include Neovim, navigation, and tmux.
hints: On each typo, use ciw to replace the full word, then press Esc.
primary_path: Search each typo with `/...` and use `ciw` to replace it.
Repeat for Neovm/navgation/tmx, save with `:w`, then `./stage check`.
fallback_path: Use word motions (`w`/`b`) if search feels fast enough.
Fix one typo, save, and run `./stage check` to see remaining misses.
why_path: Search + `ciw` targets the exact wrong word quickly and avoids slow cursor walking.
pro_move: ciw is a high-value edit for typo cleanup.
